mapper.select: SELECT w.warning_id AS alertId, w.warning_time AS alertTime, w.warning_type AS alertType, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 3 THEN '高危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 1 THEN '低危' ELSE '未知' END AS alertLevel, CASE w.handle_status WHEN 0 THEN '待确认' WHEN 1 THEN '待处理' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '已处理' WHEN 4 THEN '已忽略' ELSE '未知' END AS alertStatus, w.patient_id AS patientId, w.patient_name AS patientName, COALESCE(w.gender, CASE p.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END) AS gender, COALESCE(w.age, p.age) AS age, COALESCE(w.inpatient_no, p.inpatient_no) AS inpatientNo, COALESCE(w.dept_name, c.dept_name) AS ward, COALESCE(w.bed_no, c.bed_no, b.bed_no) AS bedNo, p.primary_diagnosis AS primaryDiagnosis, CASE WHEN c.collection_type IN (2, 3) THEN '动态心电图' ELSE '静态心电图' END AS sourceType, c.record_id AS sourceRecordId, c.ecg_no AS sourceEcgNo, c.device_name AS sourceDeviceName, c.collection_start_time AS sourceCollectTime, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.primary_diagnosis, ''), NULLIF(w.warning_desc, ''), '暂无临床表现记录') AS clinicalSymptom, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 3 THEN '肌钙蛋白偏高；CK-MB偏高；建议急查电解质' WHEN 2 THEN '心肌酶谱轻度异常；建议复查肌钙蛋白' WHEN 1 THEN '建议结合常规检验复核' ELSE '暂无LIS异常提示' END AS lisCheckData FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w LEFT JOIN patient_info p ON w.patient_id = p.patient_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_collection_record c ON w.record_id = c.record_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_bed b ON p.bed_id = b.bed_id AND b.is_deleted = 0 WHERE w.warning_id = #{alertId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.record_id AS ecgId, c.ecg_no AS ecgNo, c.collection_start_time AS collectTime, c.device_name AS deviceName, CASE c.display_status WHEN 0 THEN '待分析' WHEN 1 THEN '已分析' WHEN 2 THEN '已审核' WHEN 3 THEN '已驳回' WHEN 4 THEN '采集失败' ELSE '未知' END AS status, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.ai_conclusion_short, ''), NULLIF(a.ai_conclusion, ''), '-') AS aiConclusion FROM ecg_collection_record c LEFT JOIN ecg_ai_diagnosis a ON a.record_id = c.record_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.patient_id = #{patientId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.collection_start_time DESC, c.record_id DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT c.record_id AS ecgId, c.ecg_no AS ecgNo, c.patient_id AS patientId, c.patient_name AS patientName, COALESCE(c.gender, CASE p.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END) AS gender, COALESCE(c.age, p.age) AS age, COALESCE(c.inpatient_no, p.inpatient_no) AS inpatientNo, p.ward_id AS wardId, COALESCE(w.ward_name, c.dept_name) AS wardName, p.bed_id AS bedId, COALESCE(c.bed_no, b.bed_no) AS bedNo, p.primary_diagnosis AS primaryDiagnosis, c.device_id AS deviceId, c.device_name AS deviceName, c.lead_count AS leadCount, c.sampling_rate AS samplingRate, c.collection_duration AS collectionDuration, CASE c.collection_type WHEN 1 THEN '院内常规采集' WHEN 2 THEN '居家远程采集' WHEN 3 THEN '床旁监护' WHEN 4 THEN '手动上传' ELSE '未知' END AS collectionType, c.collection_start_time AS collectStartTime, c.collection_end_time AS collectEndTime, c.ai_analysis_status AS aiAnalysisStatus, c.report_status AS reportStatus, c.display_status AS displayStatus, CASE c.display_status WHEN 0 THEN '待分析' WHEN 1 THEN '已分析' WHEN 2 THEN '已审核' WHEN 3 THEN '已驳回' WHEN 4 THEN '采集失败' ELSE '未知' END AS status, a.ai_conclusion AS aiConclusion, c.ai_conclusion_short AS aiConclusionShort, a.abnormal_type AS abnormalType, a.confidence AS aiConfidence, c.ecg_data_file_url AS rawDataFileUrl, c.upload_source_file_url AS uploadSourceFileUrl FROM ecg_collection_record c LEFT JOIN patient_info p ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_ward w ON p.ward_id = w.ward_id AND w.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_bed b ON p.bed_id = b.bed_id AND b.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_ai_diagnosis a ON a.ai_diagnosis_id = ( SELECT ai.ai_diagnosis_id FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis ai WHERE ai.record_id = c.record_id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ai.diagnosis_time DESC, ai.ai_diagnosis_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE c.record_id = #{ecgId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
